skills.name: Critical Status
skills.description: Increases abnormal status effect damage (paralysis, poison, sleep, blast) when landing critical hits.

levels.description: Increases abnormal status effect damage (paralysis, poison, sleep, blast) when landing critical hits.

skills.name: Handicraft
skills.description: Extends the weapon sharpness gauge. However, it will not increase the gauge past its maximum.

skills.name: Blast Attack
skills.description: Increases the rate of blast buildup. (Elemental buildup has a maximum limit.)

skills.name: Blast Attack
skills.description: Increases the rate of blast buildup. (Elemental buildup has a maximum limit.)

skills.name: Windproof
skills.description: Grants protection against wind pressure.

levels.description: Slightly reduces the effects of minor wind pressure.
Reduces the effects of minor wind pressure.
Negates minor wind pressure and reduces the effects of major wind pressure.
Negates minor and major wind pressure.

skills.name: Free Elem/Ammo Up
skills.description: Unlocks your weapon's hidden element. Also increases bowgun loading capacity. (There is a cap to loading capacity.)

levels.description: Draws out 33% of hidden element and expands clip size for some ammo.
Draws out 66% of hidden element and expands clip size for many ammo.
Draws out 100% of hidden element and expands clip size for most ammo.

skills.name: Bombardier
skills.description: Increases the damage of explosive items.

skills.name: Fortify
skills.description: Temporarily increases your attack and defense every time you faint up to 2 times.

levels.description: Increases attack by 10% and defense by 15% with each use.

skills.name: Tremor Resistance
skills.description: Grants protection against ground tremors.

levels.description: Nullifies minor ground tremors and reduces the effects of major ground tremors.
Nullifies minor and major ground tremors.

skills.name: Bombardier
skills.description: Increases the damage of explosive items.

skills.name: Earplugs
skills.description: Grants protection from large monsters' roars.

levels.description: Slightly reduces the effects of weak monster roars.
Reduces the effects of weak monster roars.
Nullifies weak monster roars and reduces the effects of strong monster roars.
Nullifies weak and strong monster roars.

skills.name: Artillery Secret
skills.description: Raises the maximum level of the Artillery skill.

levels.description: Raises the maximum level of the Artillery skill.

skills.name: Flinch Free
skills.description: Prevents knockbacks and other reactions to small damage.

levels.description: Prevents knockbacks. Increases some Kinsect extract effects.
Prevents knockbacks. Tripping is reduced to a knockback. Increases some Kinsect extract effects.
Prevents knockbacks and tripping. Increases some Kinsect extract effects.

skills.name: Artillery
skills.description: Strengthens explosive attacks like gunlance shells, Wyvern's Fire, charge blade phial attacks, and sticky ammo.

levels.description: Increases power of each attack by 10% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 15%.
Increases power of each attack by 20% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 30%.
Increases power of each attack by 30% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 50%.
Increases power of each attack by 40% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 60%.
Increases power of each attack by 50% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 70%.
